title: IISER Pune Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
org: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) has released the official Senior Research Fellow Notification 2026 on the official website, iiserpune.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IISER Pune Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 32 years with MS / M.Sc in Chemistry or related areas with CGPA ≥ 9.0 or equivalent grade and minimum 2 years of research experience can attend the walk-in interview on 29-05-2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) has released the official Senior Research Fellow Notification 2026 on the official website, iiserpune.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IISER Pune Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 32 years with MS / M.Sc in Chemistry or related areas with CGPA ≥ 9.0 or equivalent grade and minimum 2 years of research experience can attend the walk-in interview on 29-05-2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation commensurate with educational qualification(s) and/or experience(s) of the applicant may be considered for candidates having qualification and experience higher than the advertised with the prior approval of the competent authority.

qualification.education_qualification: MS / M.Sc in Chemistry or related areas with CGPA>=9.0 or equivalent grade, Minimum 2 years of research experience
qualification.details: MS / M.Sc in Chemistry or related areas with CGPA>=9.0 or equivalent grade. Minimum 2 years of research experience.

salary_details.details: Rs. 42,000/- + 30% House Rent Allowance Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 is Senior Research Fellow. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Fellow post at IISER Pune.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an MS / M.Sc in Chemistry or related areas with a CGPA of 9.0 or equivalent grade, along with a minimum of 2 years of research experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Research Fellow post is 32 years. Age relaxation may be considered.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month plus 30% House Rent Allowance.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 29th May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Where is the location of IISER Pune?
faq.answer: IISER Pune is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411008.
